title: Waffle's Moss
description: 200+ mossy blocks + a trowel to scrape or apply moss instantly!
body: This mod adds over 200 mossy blocks, for a natural, aged look to your builds. ![Mossy house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/a619b68250f30be353d159aadb379e2b4eb3c00d.png) ## New in version 1.1 Mossy trowel Scrape moss off or trowel moss on with moss/vines in your offhand! Also works like shears with vines # Mossy bricks of any kind ![Mossy bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/99dc1ebf521781ac4b82e4d7b121636a22a587e0.png) Chiselled variants too ![Mossy Chiselled Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/f5150346097c9c3549f8e2246cdc128108d68336.png) Mossy stones for a natural cave look ![Mossy Stones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/6ed262cf8f512cf9a8657c3242c3143e85c14395.png) Mossy wood from the old forest ![Mossy Wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/4fbee11d8dfc64dff1241ab58dae48318e1dd79c.png) Mossy sand for an inexplicably wet desert ![Mossy Sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/9065aeb18a668b826a8c6e51592ad337376ed6b1.png) Mossy terracotta of every colour ![Mossy Terracotta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/f216d8786ad39708f65d4b95fcfeafd18cb608b7.png) Mossy copper for aged rooftops and statues ![Mossy Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/24fe8d10b8cf780819727672ab69a202f76f7da3.png) Mossy block variations (Fences, fence gates, walls, slabs and stairs) ![Mossy Fences](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/40c4c047f09f8cc9833fe3d967ae22f3f46575aa.png) ![Mossy Stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QoWk5WV/images/a606c51b4ba53cb9a8a7088b65c5912177529aed.png) Every whole block can be crafted with vines (or moss as of version 1.1). All variant blocks (stairs, fences, etc) are then crafted from pre-mossy blocks. Stonecutter options are available. ## Check out my other mods: [Waffle's Placeable Foods](https://modrinth.com/mod/waffles-placeable-foods) [Waffle's Terracotta Plaster](https://modrinth.com/mod/waffles-terracotta-plaster)
